review_snippets.title: Coda Review: Features, Pricing, Pros, Cons, and Best Alternative
review_snippets.content:
Limited task visualization (compared to full PM platforms): Coda offers basic Kanban, table, and calendar views, but lacks more advanced project management features. There are no native Gantt charts, workload views, or dependency mapping. Teams running complex projects often need to supplement Coda with other PM tools.​

 Automation limits for large datasets: Coda's automation quotas reset monthly, which can restrict scaling heavy workflows. High-frequency triggers, bulk updates, or data-heavy p

raw_text:
[CodeTwo dominates software reviews in 2024]: CodeTwo Email Signatures 365 ranks #1 among email signature management tools on G2, with a 4.8/5 rating from nearly 1,400 user reviews. It’s also the only signature app maintaining 100% user satisfaction, leaving the competition far behind. This helped us secure multiple 2025 Best Software Awards from G2.

But our Microsoft 365 email signature management solution isn’t the only CodeTwo software that did well on G2 in 2024. CodeTwo Exchange Rules Pro remains in high demand for customers who prefer to keep their email server on-premises. The Best Support and Likely to Recommend badges highlight our commitment to excellent customer service, as well as our customers’ strong satisfaction and trust in the product. [...] CodeTwo Office 365 Migration also received multiple accolades on G2, including Easiest Setup, Most Implementable, Best Estimated ROI and Easiest To Do Business With. These distinctions highlight the excellent user experience, smooth deployment, and efficiency our product delivers for cloud mailbox migrations.

## #1 email signature software on TrustRadius

CodeTwo Email Signatures 365 sits at #1 on the Best Email Signature Software list on TrustRadius. With an average score of 9.8/10, our solution received the 2024 Top Rated Award and the 2025 Buyer’s Choice Award, proving that it excels in meeting customer needs and remains the top choice among admins and IT pros.

## Highest user recommendation rate on Gartner Digital Markets brands [...] ## G2: consistent Leader & Best Software Product worldwide

CodeTwo continues to lead the Email Signature Software category on G2.com, with CodeTwo Email Signatures 365 recognized as the Leader for the 5th consecutive year. We’ve also earned badges such as Best Relationship, Best Usage, Best Results and Most Implementable, reflecting how highly customers rate our solution in terms of quality of support, intuitive day-to-day usage, ease and speed of deployment, and meeting customer goals/ROI.

[Coda.io Review: Features, Benefits, and Drawbacks in 2024]: Reviews from platforms like GetApp, G2, and Product Hunt highlight common praises such as the platform’s ability to consolidate multiple tools into one, and its extensive customization options.

However, some users have noted areas for improvement, such as the need for more advanced project management features and better performance with large data sets.

Case studies and testimonials from real users underscore the platform’s ability to enhance productivity and streamline workflows across various industries.

## FAQs

### 1. What is Coda.io?

Coda.io is a platform that combines documents, spreadsheets, and applications into a single, integrated workspace.

### 2. Is Coda.io free?

Coda.io offers a free plan with basic functionalities, as well as paid plans with more advanced features. [...] Coda.io offers a range of pricing tiers to accommodate different types of users. The free plan provides basic functionalities suitable for individuals and small teams, while the Pro and Team plans offer more advanced features and greater collaboration capabilities.

The Enterprise plan is designed for larger organizations, with additional security and support options.

A cost-benefit analysis shows that while Coda.io’s pricing is competitive, the higher-tier plans offer significant value for teams needing extensive collaboration and automation features.

## Customer Reviews and Feedback

Customer feedback on Coda.io is generally positive, with users praising its flexibility, ease of use, and powerful features. [...] For example, teams heavily reliant on specific project management methodologies might find dedicated tools like Jira or Asana more suitable. Furthermore, some users have reported occasional performance issues when handling very large documents or complex projects.

## Coda.io Pricing and Plans

|  |  |  |
 --- 
| Plans | Pricing | Features |
| Free | $0/doc maker per month | Unlimited editors and viewers Collaborative docs Basic integrations |
| Pro | $12/doc maker per month | Unlimited doc size 30-Days version history Pro Packs Custom domains |
| Team | $36/doc maker per month | Unlimited Automation Unlimited version history Team Packs Group Trainings |
| Enterprise | Custom pricing | SOC 2 SAML, SSO SCIM Enterprise packs |

[Read Customer Service Reviews of www.g2.com - Trustpilot]: After that, I asked for a final response letter regarding my complaint, including how they handle user data under GDPR—what they collect, why they collect it, and how it’s used. I never received a single proper answer. My emails were simply ignored.  
  
At this point, my experience with G2 feels extremely one-sided:  
  
They demand detailed user data, but don’t clearly explain how it’s used.  
  
They reject legitimate, honest reviews without any transparency.  
  
Their “support” appears to be nothing but automated templates.  
  
They make it nearly impossible to get a real human response. [...] Had trouble at first because the identity check kept failing and support wasn't clear, So submitting a review was frustating. But after I raised the issue again, they finally fixed it properly and thi... See more

Our small business recently signed up with www. 800.com. We received a toll free number which gives us credibility. Their support staff have all been great at helping with any questions we have. Ver... See more

G2 is my go-to place for checking out software before I buy. The reviews are from real users, not just marketing hype. It's saved me from making bad decisions a few times. Really useful. [...] My experience with G2’s review process has been extremely disappointing. Even after providing detailed explanations, describing my usage clearly, and even submitting proof such as company login screenshots, they still kept asking for “more clarification” without telling me which specific part needed improvement. Despite giving every piece of information requested, they continue to reject the review and repeatedly ask to “elaborate more,” without any guidance on what to fix. This makes the process frustrating, unclear, and unnecessarily difficult. If G2 expects highly detailed reviews, they should at least communicate the exact areas that require updates so users can correct them properly.

October 24, 2025

Unprompted review

Reply from G2

 Automation limits for large datasets: Coda's automation quotas reset monthly, which can restrict scaling heavy workflows. High-frequency triggers, bulk updates, or data-heavy processes can quickly hit these limits.
